title: Grammitis dissimulans
taxonomy: Grammitis dissimulans is classified within the family Polypodiaceae, which is a large family of ferns commonly known as the polypody ferns. This classification places it within the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. At the rank of order, it falls under Polypodiales, a diverse group of ferns. Grammitis dissimulans is further classified as being within the suborder Polypodiineae, which is a suborder of the order Polypodiales. Its classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other ferns within the same family and order.
